**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Yueboo Power System Co., Ltd. is a highly visible, publicly listed R&D headquarters and system integrator for new energy commercial vehicle powertrains, notoriously misclassified by the registry as an 'Automobile Complete Vehicle Manufacturer'. The 'Apple Inc.' profile has been entirely deleted. While its status as a 'Listed Joint Stock Company' (A-share) with ~78 Million RMB capital and 120 employees indicates a substantial corporate presence, its physical address exposes the truth: it is headquartered on the 4th floor of a commercial building (Building 4, No. 18 Jialingjiang East Street) in Nanjing's Jianye District (CBD). Building complete automobiles in a 4th-floor office is physically impossible. Its true value lies in its extensive scope covering 'R&D, testing, and sales of new energy powertrains, motors, and intelligent driving systems'. This entity functions as the corporate brain, R&D center, and sales hub for the Yueboo group, outsourcing physical heavy manufacturing to its subsidiary plants elsewhere.
